Fees
0% commission and no hidden fees The fee for executing trades is the spread – the difference between the buy and sell price.
Spot Market Maker: 0%-0.1% Taker: 0.02%-0.1% Futures Market Maker: 0%-0.02% Taker: 0.016%-0.075%
Trading Fee for Standard Contract - Trading Fee Rate: 0.075% (The current fee rate is discounted at 0.045%.)
No Commissions
Spot trading fees may vary depending on the pair, but the standard trading fee does not exceed 0.1%. WBT Holding or Owning will reduce your maker fee to 0%. VIP customer can enjoy up to -0.001% maker and 0.03 taker fee.
Benefit from industry leading trading conditions: - Institutionally tight spreads - Zero commissions; and - Fixed spreads EUR/USD spread fixed at 0.5 pips Wall Steet 30 spread fixed at 1.9 points
- Spreads from just 19 cents on gold and 0.4 pips on SPX500 - No commissions - Guaranteed stop loss available, providing extra protection for your trades
$3 USD per $100,000 USD notional volume traded Spreads from 0.0 pips
Razor sharp spreads from 0.0 pips on FX majors and $3.5 commission per 1 standard FX lot per side
FX & Metals: $2.25 Commission per side per lot Equity Index CFDs: $0 Commission Crypto CFDs: $0 Commission US Share CFDs: $0 Commission Energy and Soft Commodity CFDs: $0 Commission
Forex from 0.5 pips CFDs from 0.45 points
Spreads from 0, $3.5 commission per lot per side (for Fx & Metals), other instruments with all-inclusive floating spreads
Commodities: Spreads from 12 points on Gold, commission-free. Forex: Spreads from 0.0 pips, commission applies. Cryptos: Spreads from 12 points on Bitcoin, commission-free. Over 100+ Cryptocurrency derivatives. Share CFDs: Low commission trading on US and UK stocks, check our website for info.
- Spreads starting as low as 0.0 pips - Commissions only $3.5 per lot per side with no commissions on CFD Indices, Cryptocurrencies, Oil, and Bonds - Ranked #1 Broker for Commissions and Fees for four years in a row (2021–2024) by ForexBrokers.com.
—
RAW Account Spreads: from 0.0 pips FX Commission: $2.50 per lot per side Crypto Commission: 0.03% of notional per side
Fees as low as 0.02% on Spot, and 0.01% on Futures Liquidity providers can enjoy up to 0.01% on Spot and 0.05% rebate on Futures No hidden fees or spreads
$0 Fee-free funding options Top-tier liquidity and market leading pricing, 24/5 Consistently low spreads from 0.0 pips
0% commission trading and ultra-low spreads starting from 0.0* pips.
Spot Trading Fee Rates: both makers and takers is 0.2% Futures Trading Fee Rates:makers is 0.01% and for takers is 0.06%
ECN - raw spreads with volume based commission in 1.5 - 3.5 units of base currency range
For spot trade, the fee is 0.1% For future trade, the maker fee is 0.02%; the taker fee is 0.05%

TradingView

TradingView is a world-class charting platform and social network used by 50M+ traders and investors worldwide to spot opportunities across global markets.
